proprietorship-registration.label: What name will you use for the proprietorship (same as owner or a trade name)?
Do you have the owner's PAN and Aadhaar ready (Yes/No + brief)?
What is the main business activity you plan to carry out (brief description)?
What address will you use for the business and do you have proof (rent agreement/ownership)?
Do you need help opening a current bank account in the business name (Yes/No)?
Will you require GST registration immediately or expect turnover below threshold (approximate)?

partnership-registration.label: How many partners will be part of the firm and are all partners Indian residents (Yes/No + brief)?
Do you already have a partnership deed drafted or need us to prepare one (Yes/No)?
What is the approximate capital contribution by each partner (approximate values)?
What profit-sharing ratio do you intend to follow among partners (brief)?
What type of business activities will the partnership undertake (brief description)?
In which state will the partnership be registered and operate primarily?

opc-registration.label: What are 1–2 proposed names for the OPC (in order of preference)?
Who will be the sole member and director (name and residency status)?
Who will be the nominee for the OPC (name and relation)?
What is the proposed authorized capital (approximate amount)?
What will be the main business objectives of the OPC (brief)?
What address will be used as the registered office and do you have proof (Yes/No)?

llp-registration.label: What are your preferred LLP names (2 options)?
How many partners/designated partners will be part of the LLP?
Is at least one designated partner an Indian resident (Yes/No)?
What is the total capital contribution planned (approximate)?
Do you need us to draft the LLP agreement (Yes/No)?
What business activities will the LLP carry out (brief description)?

private-limited-company-registration.label: Provide 2 preferred names for the private limited company?
How many directors will the company have and are all DIN-ready (Yes/No + brief)?
What will be the shareholding pattern among shareholders (approximate %)?
What is the proposed authorized capital (approximate amount)?
What is the primary business activity of the company (brief)?
What address will be used as the registered office and is proof available (Yes/No)?

section-8-company-registration.label: What is the main charitable objective (education, NGO, social cause, etc.)?
How many promoters/directors will be involved (minimum 2)?
Do you confirm profits will not be distributed to members (Yes/No)?
What address will be used as the registered office with proof available (Yes/No)?
What are the expected funding sources (donations, grants, etc.)?
Do you need assistance with Section 8 license application (Yes/No)?

trust-registration.label: What name do you propose for the trust?
How many trustees will be part of the trust?
What are the objectives of the trust (charitable/religious/etc.)?
What address will be used for trust registration (with proof available)?
Do you already have a trust deed or need us to draft one (Yes/No)?
Is there any initial property or corpus being settled into the trust (Yes/No + brief)?

public-limited-company-registration.label: Provide 2 preferred names for the public limited company?
Do you have at least 3 directors ready with documents (Yes/No)?
What is the proposed authorized share capital (approximate amount)?
What business activities will the company undertake (brief)?
Do you plan to raise funds from the public or list later (Yes/No + brief)?
What address will be used as the registered office (proof available Yes/No)?

producer-company-registration.label: How many producer members (farmers/producers) will be part of the company?
What type of production activity is involved (agriculture, dairy, etc.)?
What are the proposed names for the producer company?
What is the proposed authorized capital (approximate)?
How many directors will be appointed (minimum 5 required)?
What address will be used as the registered office (proof available Yes/No)?

indian-subsidiary-registration.label: What is the name and country of the foreign parent company?
What percentage will the foreign company hold in the Indian subsidiary?
What is the proposed authorized capital (approximate amount)?
Do you have at least one Indian resident director (Yes/No)?
What business activities will the subsidiary carry out in India?
Will the investment fall under automatic route or require approval (approximate/unsure)?
